glosses.ja: ろうそく; スパークプラグ

sentences.target: On allume une bougie sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ alym yn buʒi syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: On allume une bougie sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ alym yn buʒi syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: We light a candle on the table.
translations.es: Encendemos una vela en la mesa.
translations.de: Wir zünden eine Kerze auf dem Tisch an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在桌子上点一支蜡烛。
translations.yue: 我哋喺枱上點一支蠟燭。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thắp một cây nến trên bàn.
translations.nl: We steken een kaars aan op tafel.
translations.hi: हम मेज़ पर एक मोमबत्ती जलाते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tenner et lys på bordet.
translations.id: Kami menyalakan sebuah lilin di atas meja.
translations.sv: Vi tänder ett ljus på bordet.
translations.da: Vi tænder et lys på bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの上でろうそくに火をつけます。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun; generic/colloquial 'we' (3rd person singular agreement).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces a new count noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'allume'.
Preposition meaning 'on (top of)'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; marks a specific noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: J'achète une bougie parfumée pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒaʃɛt yn buʒi paʁfyme puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: J'achète une bougie parfumée pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒaʃɛt yn buʒi paʁfyme puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I'm buying a scented candle for tonight.
translations.es: Voy a comprar una vela aromática para esta noche.
translations.de: Ich kaufe eine Duftkerze für heute Abend.
translations.it: Compro una candela profumata per stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤을 위해 향초를 살 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要为今晚买一支香薰蜡烛。
translations.yue: 我會為今晚買一支香薰蠟燭。
translations.ru: Я покупаю ароматическую свечу для сегодняшнего вечера.
translations.pt: Vou comprar uma vela perfumada para hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam için kokulu bir mum alıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mua một cây nến thơm cho tối nay.
translations.nl: Ik koop een geurkaars voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Я купую ароматичну свічку на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: मैं आज रात के लिए सुगंधित मोमबत्ती खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Kupuję świecę zapachową na dzisiejszy wieczór.
translations.el: Αγοράζω ένα αρωματικό κερί για απόψε.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper et duftlys til i kveld.
translations.id: Saya membeli lilin beraroma untuk malam ini.
translations.sv: Jag köper ett doftljus till ikväll.
translations.ro: Cumpăr o lumânare parfumată pentru diseară.
translations.cs: Kupuji vonnou svíčku na dnešní večer.
translations.da: Jeg køber et duftlys til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜のために香り付きのキャンドルを買います。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; 'je' elides before vowel (clitic attached).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'bougie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'J'achète'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular; agrees with 'bougie'.
Preposition expressing purpose/time; introduces the time expression 'ce soir'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' in a deictic time NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'ce soir' functioning as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: Mets la bougie dans le bocal, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /mɛ la buʒi dɑ̃ lə bɔkal sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Mets la bougie dans le bocal, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /mɛ la buʒi dɑ̃ lə bɔkal sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Put the candle in the jar, please.
translations.es: Pon la vela en el frasco, por favor.
translations.de: Stell die Kerze bitte ins Glas.
translations.it: Metti la candela nel barattolo, per favore.
translations.zh-Hans: 请把蜡烛放进玻璃罐里。
translations.yue: 唔該將支蠟燭放入個玻璃樽。
translations.pt: Por favor, coloque a vela no frasco.
translations.vi: Vui lòng đặt cây nến vào trong lọ.
translations.ar: من فضلك ضع الشمعة في البرطمان.
translations.nl: Doe de kaars alsjeblieft in de glazen pot.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, поклади свічку в банку.
translations.hu: Tedd a gyertyát a befőttesüvegbe, kérlek.
translations.hi: कृपया मोमबत्ती को जार में रखो.
translations.el: Βάλε το κερί στο βάζο, παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Sett lyset i glasskrukken, vær så snill.
translations.id: Tolong taruh lilin ke dalam toples.
translations.ro: Te rog, pune lumânarea în borcan.
translations.ja: ろうそくを瓶に入れてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative mood, 2nd person singular; main verb issuing a command.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners the direct object 'bougie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'Mets'.
Preposition meaning 'in/into'; marks the goal/location.
Definite article, masculine singular; modifies 'bocal'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Contraction of 'si' + clitic pronoun 'il'; part of the fixed polite formula 's'il te plaît' ('please').
Clitic object pronoun, 2nd person singular (indirect); in 's'il te plaît' it marks the experiencer 'to you'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the polite expression 's'il te plaît'.

sentences.target: Il reste une bougie dans le placard.
sentences.reading: /il ʁɛst yn buʒi dɑ̃ lə plakaʁ/

translations.fr: Il reste une bougie dans le placard.
translations.ipa: /il ʁɛst yn buʒi dɑ̃ lə plakaʁ/
translations.en: There's a candle left in the cupboard.
translations.es: Queda una vela en el armario.
translations.de: Im Schrank ist noch eine Kerze übrig.
translations.pt: Ainda resta uma vela no armário.
translations.vi: Trong tủ vẫn còn một cây nến.
translations.ar: لا تزال هناك شمعة واحدة في الخزانة.
translations.nl: Er is nog een kaars in de kast.
translations.hu: A szekrényben maradt még egy gyertya.
translations.hi: अलमारी में एक मोमबत्ती बची है.
translations.el: Έχει μείνει ένα κερί στο ντουλάπι.
translations.nb: Det er et lys igjen i skapet.
translations.id: Masih ada satu lilin di lemari.
translations.sv: Det finns ett ljus kvar i skåpet.
translations.ro: A mai rămas o lumânare în dulap.
translations.da: Der er ét lys tilbage i skabet.
translations.ja: 戸棚にろうそくが一本残っている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun in an existential construction with 'rester'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; existential sense 'there remains'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the postverbal subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; logical subject in the existential construction.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; modifies 'placard'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

कृपया मोमबत्ती को जार में रखो.
